case_title: HERNANDEZ, BETTY vs. PEARSON, LORETTA HART et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, BETTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON FEBRUARY 17, 1999 $2,323.54 RENT, $176.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,499.54, LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, BETTY SERVED DEC-20-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 107 MADDUX ST, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $176.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, LORETTA HART
